name: python3-requests
title: python3-requests
summary: elegant and simple HTTP library for Python3, built for human beings
description:
elegant and simple HTTP library for Python3, built for human beings
Requests allow you to send HTTP/1.1 requests. You can add headers, form data,
multipart files, and parameters with simple Python dictionaries, and access
the response data in the same way. It's powered by httplib and urllib3, but
it does all the hard work and crazy hacks for you.
.
Features
.
- International Domains and URLs
- Keep-Alive & Connection Pooling
- Sessions with Cookie Persistence
- Browser-style SSL Verification
- Basic/Digest Authentication
- Elegant Key/Value Cookies
- Automatic Decompression
- Unicode Response Bodies
- Multipart File Uploads
- Connection Timeouts
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-requests because elegant and simple HTTP library for Python3, built for human beings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-requests as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-requests with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-requests --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
